observed_anomaly_cues: Surface irregularity consistent with dye fault
Localized deviation from normal leather appearance
mechanism_explanation: Chemical inconsistency in the dyeing process produces color variations.
severity_visual_description: minor color inconsistency visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Standardize dye formulation and control bath temperature.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the color inconsistency would be absent and surface appears normal.
